name: list_tickets
description: Retrieve support tickets submitted through the tawk.to widget. Supports filtering by status and date.

parameters.name: property_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for your tawk.to property.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination, starting at 0.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results per page. Maximum 100.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by ticket status. One of: open, closed, pending.
